## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss SEO performance, content updates, and ongoing tasks for Ramp's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Block pages: Impressions up, CTR stable; monitoring for potential deep dive next week](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Fixes successful, performance back to previous levels (top 3 for specific searches)](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Expense category pages stable; tuning pages saw improvement (esp. sets vs. liability)](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Challenges identified for audit trails and e-commerce accounting content](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Content production on track for vendor pages, Treasury articles, and other assignments](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Block pages: New impression range, slight increase; CTR holding steady](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
      - [Plan to investigate specific pages if trend continues next week](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Fixes effective, performance recovered](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Most pages back in top 10, many in top 3 for per diem searches](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Maintaining consistent range and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Significant improvement](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Sets vs. liability page gaining positions compared to Oct-Dec average](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

### Content Challenges and Insights

      - [Competitor (likely Paychex) ranks 2nd/3rd, covers non-finance topics](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Potential refresh: expand to general audit trails, then focus on finance](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [E-commerce accounting:](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Top results feature platform lists and videos](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Highly competitive keyword, causing slower traction](https://fathom.video/share/y2uGg-mHwZzSMYeCpkMG9J2uQchN87sK?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
